title: Hornet Removal in Tarrytown, NY | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Tarrytown, Westchester. Safe elimination of hornet nests from homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for $350-$550 service!
intro: Dealing with aggressive hornets in Tarrytown requires immediate professional attention. Best Pest Control NYC provides safe, effective hornet removal services throughout Tarrytown and the surrounding Westchester area, protecting your family and property from these dangerous stinging insects. Our experienced technicians quickly eliminate hornet nests from residential and commercial properties with guaranteed results.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Tarrytown's unique residential communities, from historic estates near the Old Croton Aqueduct to modern developments along the Hudson River. Our licensed technicians use safe, environmentally conscious methods and offer same-day emergency service to protect your family and pets from hornet threats.
localContext: Tarrytown's lush tree-lined streets, proximity to the Rockefeller State Park Preserve, and historic properties create ideal nesting conditions for hornets, particularly in eaves, attics, and wooded areas. Our team is familiar with the architectural diversity of Tarrytown homes—from Victorian estates in the Historic District to contemporary residences—and tailors removal strategies to protect your property's unique features.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a hornet emergency in Tarrytown?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency hornet removal services throughout Tarrytown and Westchester County. Given the aggressive nature of hornets, especially when nests are disturbed, we prioritize rapid response to protect your family. Most Tarrytown clients receive service within 2-4 hours of calling during business hours.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal service?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a thorough property inspection, safe removal and elimination of the hornet nest, treatment of the affected area to prevent re-infestation, and cleanup of the site. Pricing varies based on nest location, size, and accessibility. We provide upfront quotes with no hidden fees and include a service guarantee.

faqs.question: Are hornets common in Tarrytown, and when is peak season?
faqs.answer: Yes, hornets are quite common in Tarrytown due to the abundance of wooded areas, mature trees, and proximity to the Hudson River. Peak hornet activity occurs from late spring through early fall (May to October), with nests reaching maximum size in late summer. Early detection and removal are crucial to prevent colonies from growing dangerously large.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family, pets, and historic home?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use targeted, EPA-approved treatments that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. For Tarrytown's many historic properties, we take extra care to protect architectural features, using methods that won't damage wood, masonry, or vintage materials while effectively eliminating the hornet threat.
